evidence-binding: n5-deletions 80baa214e500

non_tdd_reason: Pure deletion of retired generated artifacts — the six `<role>-max.toml` xhigh effort-variant profiles (×3 editions = 18 files) and their `[agents.<role>-max]` registration blocks (6 per config/agents.toml × 3 = 18 blocks). There is no behavior to test-drive in a deletion; the machine-checkable absence asserts land in the contract validators (n7) and the walkthroughs (n8).

verification_tier: regression-green
- 18 `<role>-max.toml` removed via `git rm` (planner/code-architect/tdd-guide/code-reviewer/security-reviewer/adversarial-verifier × github/gitlab/gitea); `ls plugins/*/agents/*-max.toml` => 0 remaining.
- Each config/agents.toml: 6 `[agents.*-max]` blocks stripped (header through the line before the next top-level table); post-scan => 0 `[agents.*-max]` blocks and 14 base `[agents.<role>]` tables intact per edition (no base block collateral-damaged).
- Deletions explicit (not relying on sync:editions to prune); user-owned `*-max` never blanket-globbed.
